name: coding-agent-runner
description: Run Codex CLI, Claude Code, Cursor Agent, OpenCode, and Pi ACP from Node.js.

scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
scripts.smoke:all: npm run build && node scripts/smoke-cli.mjs all
scripts.smoke:claude: npm run build && node scripts/smoke-cli.mjs claude
scripts.smoke:codex: npm run build && node scripts/smoke-cli.mjs codex
scripts.smoke:cursor: npm run build && node scripts/smoke-cli.mjs cursor
scripts.smoke:opencode: npm run build && node scripts/smoke-cli.mjs opencode
scripts.smoke:pi: npm run build && node scripts/smoke-cli.mjs pi

author: yinguangyao
